landing.hero_description: Everything you need to accept Bitcoin and Lightning - in one place. Create PoS terminals, Lightning addresses, and exports for accounting — while keeping full control over your funds.
landing.non_custodial_description: Funds go directly to your wallet. We never touch your sats.
landing.lightning_ready_description: Optimized for Blink & Aqua wallets. Instant settlement.
landing.smart_exports_description: Automated CSV reports for accounting and tax compliance.
landing.monthly_recap_description: Get automated summaries delivered directly to your inbox.
landing.everything_you_need_description: A complete suite of tools to manage your Bitcoin business.
landing.multi_store_description: Run multiple businesses from a single dashboard. Switch contexts instantly and keep your finances organized.
landing.point_of_sale_description: Customizable PoS keypads for retail or mobile usage.
landing.invoicing_description: Create, track, and export invoices securely.
landing.api_description: Seamlessly integrate with your e-shop or custom application. Your API keys stay with you, ensuring maximum security and privacy.
landing.pricing_description: Pay with sats. No credit card required.
landing.free_description: Perfect for testing and small personal projects.
landing.pro_description: For growing businesses that need more power.
landing.failed_to_create_checkout: Failed to create checkout. Please try again.
landing.how_it_works_intro: Satflux is a control panel for BTCPay Server. It lets you accept Bitcoin and Lightning payments without limits, manage multiple stores, and keep everything in one place.
landing.how_it_works_step1_text: Sign up for free. No credit card. Payments always go directly to your wallet.
landing.how_it_works_step2_text: In the panel you create a store for your business. Choose your wallet (Blink or Aqua) and complete a short setup.
landing.how_it_works_step3_text: Add a Point of Sale terminal for in-person sales — on tablet or mobile. Customers pay via QR code.
landing.how_it_works_step4_text: Create an address in the format your_name{'@'}satflux.org. Accept Lightning payments simply — no complex details.
landing.how_it_works_step5_text: WooCommerce, Magento, Drupal, PrestaShop, Shopify. Pay Button or plugin to accept Bitcoin payments in your online store.
landing.how_it_works_step6_text: Customers pay with Bitcoin or Lightning. You keep full control of funds and get exports for accounting.
landing.how_it_works_demo_intro: Try a live terminal — the same kind you can use in your store.
